author: etan_status
content:
yeah, the builder index flag is complementary, it could be a followup, but 8282 alone still has sufficient benefits.
so, the ugly remaining parts are (1) the onboarding, and (2) the conflation of builder stuff and the coinbase payment with validator withdrawals

author: barnabasbusa
content: how are we gonna stop the possible dos attack on testnets if we reduce the withdrawability delay from 8192 to 64?

author: barnabasbusa
content: 64 epochs could be filled with builder deposits with fake eth quite easily

author: barnabasbusa
content: even if the tx cost gonna be high

author: nflaig
content: You can fill up to the target which is 8 per block, and the max will be 64, how is it a dos?

author: barnabasbusa
content: costs about 16k eth to keep those 8 slots blocked

author: barnabasbusa
content: and thats gonna be fully recyclable

author: barnabasbusa
content: yeah not sure if anyone gonna dos it

author: barnabasbusa
content: esp if the gas fee gonna keep going up
